creator: rodrigc@crodrigues.org
text:
Hi,

Information for ripping CD's in FreeBSD is in the FreeBSD Handbook:

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/creating-cds.html#DUPLICATING-AUDIOCDS

and:

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/sound-mp3.html#RIP-CD

--
Craig Rodrigues        
rodrigc@crodrigues.org
